subjects.description: blue Pacific waves crashing against rugged Big Sur cliffs
subjects.appearance_details: cold blue water, white-tipped surf, foamy impact bursts, and rolling swell lines striking dark rock
subjects.relationship: main natural motion subject shaping the coastline view
subjects.location: below the cliff edge along Garay Point Beach near Big Sur
subjects.relative_size: vast ocean surface dwarfing rocks, road, and distant island
subjects.orientation: waves moving diagonally from open sea toward the rocky shore
subjects.pose: continuous swell pattern curling and breaking at the cliff base
subjects.action: crashes against the rugged cliffs and spreads white foam along the rocks
subjects.state_changes: blue waves rise; white foam blooms at impact; water pulls back into the sea
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: deep blue water with white foam, spray, and reflective sunset highlights

subjects.description: rugged cliff edge with green shrubbery
subjects.appearance_details: steep rocky drop, jagged edges jutting over the sea, low green shrubs, and a road high above the beach
subjects.relationship: coastal landform framing the crashing waves
subjects.location: right and lower frame edges beneath the drone path
subjects.relative_size: massive landform larger than lighthouse island and shoreline details
subjects.orientation: cliff line running diagonally along the coast
subjects.pose: fixed steep face dropping sharply to the beach
subjects.action: stands against the surf while wind brushes the shrubs
subjects.state_changes: sunset light warms the rocks; shrubs flutter subtly; wave spray darkens lower stone
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: rough dark stone, golden dry grass, and dense green coastal shrubs
subjects.facial_features: jagged cliff contours and protruding ledges

subjects.description: distant small island with a lighthouse
subjects.appearance_details: rocky offshore island holding a slender lighthouse silhouette, softened by sea haze and sunset glow
subjects.relationship: distant focal landmark beyond the crashing coast
subjects.relative_size: small against the ocean and cliffs
subjects.orientation: upright lighthouse centered on the island
subjects.action: remains still as waves and drone motion create parallax around it
subjects.state_changes: island becomes clearer as the drone angle shifts; lighthouse edge catches warm light; sea haze changes subtly
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: pale lighthouse surface and dark rocky island textures under golden light
subjects.facial_features: vertical tower profile with small lantern room

background_setting: The Big Sur coast near Garay Point Beach, with the Pacific Coast Highway high above a steep cliff, rugged shoreline below, open ocean, and a lighthouse island in the distance.

lighting.conditions: Golden sunset light grazing rocks and shrubbery, cool blue water in shadow, white foam catching bright highlights, and soft haze on the horizon.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Golden sunset light grazing rocks and shrubbery, cool blue water in shadow, white foam catching bright highlights, and soft haze on the horizon.

aesthetics.composition: Raw coastal beauty, dramatic elevation, sweeping drone scale, blue surf against warm cliffs, and wild Pacific atmosphere.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Raw coastal beauty, dramatic elevation, sweeping drone scale, blue surf against warm cliffs, and wild Pacific atmosphere.

cinematography.camera_motion: High drone view gliding along the cliff edge and tilting down to reveal waves crashing far below, then drifting toward the distant lighthouse island.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic natural coast documentary with grand scale, clean aerial motion, and sunset contrast.
context: A drone surveys the rugged Big Sur coastline as Pacific waves hammer the cliffs near a dramatic drop from road to beach.

actions.description: The drone looks down over the cliff edge as blue waves roll toward the rocky shore.
White-tipped surf crashes against the cliffs, sending foam outward while golden light warms the rocks.
The view glides outward to include the distant lighthouse island and the green shrub-covered cliff rim.

segments.description: Open with a high drone view over the steep Big Sur cliff and incoming waves.
segments.key_changes: cliff edge reveals height; waves approach shore; sunset glow defines rocks
segments.camera: aerial drone tilt-down along the cliff

segments.description: Track the main wave impacts against rugged rocks and foaming shoreline.
segments.key_changes: surf breaks into white foam; spray rises; water retreats and reforms
segments.camera: smooth lateral drone glide following the coastline

segments.description: Widen to show the road drop, shrubbery, open sea, and lighthouse island.
segments.key_changes: island enters clearer view; coastline scale expands; golden horizon deepens
segments.camera: wide drone pullback with horizon reveal

temporal_caption: A drone glides above Big Sur cliffs as blue Pacific waves crash below and a distant lighthouse island glows in sunset light.
audio_description: Crashing surf, wind over cliffs, distant gulls, low ocean rumble, and faint aerial ambience.
